title:
Courtown, Patrick - former Deputy
Chief Whip, House of Lords (Captain of The Queen’s Bodyguard of the Yeomen
of the Guard)  - ACOBA advice
body: "The Earl of Courtown left his role at House of Lords in July 2024  Chairman of The Feathers 90 Club, The Feathers Association  The Earl of Courtown sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with The Feathers Association. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in December 2024; and the appointment was taken up later that month. [An accessible version of the letter is available here.] "
